content.description:
Participants of PHOTOGRAPHY competition are challenged to showcase their talent by presenting photographs based on a given theme. The event aims to highlight originality, technical skills, and the ability to convey powerful messages through images. Topic will be given On-Spot. Only one Round.
Contact: BLESSLIN & JAIDEEP - 6381980917

rules.rule: While sending images you have to mention your college name, team number, and name of participants
